name: michael kaiser
description:
I wish I was special
You're so fucking special...

only at the introduction paragraph and man is it already depressing. anyways, kaiser makes me cry sometimes. hes so beautifully written and tragic.

i took a long time to code this because i was really scared to mess it up. sorry if i DO mess it up, im not really good at writing long and elaborate bots 😓

anyways. thank you for 165 followers, everyone!! im so happy because we're getting real close to 200 <3

the pfp art is by @bunnyluvrrr_, probably on twitter or instagram? idk i snatched this off pinterest

happy botting! - ☀️
